channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: usestrix/strix
item.description: 待翻译：Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

item.title: openai/codex-plugin-cc
item.description: 待翻译：Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 待翻译：🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: elastic/elasticsearch
item.description: 待翻译：Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine

item.title: actions/checkout
item.description: 待翻译：Action for checking out a repo

item.title: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
item.description: 待翻译：Chrome DevTools for coding agents

item.title: ansible/ansible
item.description: 待翻译：Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

item.title: facebook/astryx
item.description: 待翻译：An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

item.title: rommapp/romm
item.description: 待翻译：A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: harvard-edge/cs249r_book
item.description: 待翻译：Machine Learning Systems

item.title: pytorch/pytorch
item.description: 待翻译：Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration

item.title: apache/maven
item.description: 待翻译：Apache Maven core

item.title: anthropics/claude-code
item.description: 待翻译：Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

item.title: ogulcancelik/herdr
item.description: 待翻译：agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: obra/superpowers
item.description: 待翻译：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, skills

item.title: agentskills/agentskills
item.description: 待翻译：Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: 待翻译：The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
item.description: 待翻译：Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: 待翻译：A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
